<2.00>2014/05/29 NISSAN XX2 H.Yokoyama Add WDBID, FFD, IOCBID items.
<1.00>2014/03/05 NISSAN XX2 Ryou Urushihata Initial create.
[28/06/2016] Richa Tripathy Updated the xml as per software 5M1D version 0000.
[10-03-2017] Ishita Kumar Updated the xml for Devices update.
[15-03-2017] Ishita Kumar DID tab corrected
[13-10-2017] Minjae Baek DiagOn CAN changed -Tool->ECU : 7E0 ->18DA15F1 -ECU->Tool : 7E8 ->18DAF115
[06-12-2017] Minaje Baek Vehicle project added : xJA, xJFB, xFB Diag version added : VDIAG $63
[18-01-2018] Ishita Kumar Screen updated
[01-02-2018] Ishita Kumar DTC E14F, E148, E241, E143, E144, E146, E142 updated
[06-03-2018] Ishita Kumar DTC E118, E141, E14A, E14E, E150, E153, E154, E159, E15B, E16B, E252, E25F, E265 and E276 updated
[13-08-2018] Keerthika NATARAJAN DTCs updated
[20-08-2018] Keerthika NATARAJAN DIDs label name updated
[06-09-2018] Keerthika NATARAJAN DIDs updated Screen updated
[18-09-2018] Ishita Kumar DIDs updated
[12-10-2018] Ishita Kumar DTCs updated
[23-04-2019] Sidhartha Velpula DID's & DTC's Updated
[23-04-2019] Ishita Kumar Screen Updated
[10-05-2019] Ishita Kumar $3441 DID normalised ReadDTC updated
[16-05-2019] Ishita Kumar C146 DTC added
[17-05-2019] Ishita Kumar $F0DO formula updated
[17-06-2019] Sidhartha Velpula DTC's Updated.
[28-06-2019] Ramya Karthikeyan DID's & DTC's Updated Auto-Identification updated FFD - F0D0, F0D1 added
[28-08-2019] Sidhartha Velpula Read DTC request Updated.
[18-09-2019] Sidhartha Velpula Screen's Updated.
[22-10-2019] Minjae Baek IUPR screen added, TAS screen updated, SW62 ID added
[08-11-2019] Ramya Karthikeyan DID's & DTC's Updated.
[26-11-2019] DID 30B4 data unsigned
[06-12-2019] FFD Mileage data F0D0 devided by 10 -> 1 Auto_ID added for SW64
[19-12-2019] Ramya Karthikeyan Description for DTCs P200C and P244D updated

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Label.Text: Step 1: Select session as "Extended Diagnostic Session" then push the button
Step 4: If you want to stop, select item to stop then push the button.
You have to consider the input value in 1 byte of HEX format for each case
Step 2: Select item to control, "ShortTermAdjustment", "Control start", write input value, and then push the button
Step 3: You can check the status of control
For IOCP : If you want to start control, "Short term adjustment", If you want to stop control, "RenturnControlToECU"
When you click the button : Start when IOCP is start, Stop when ICOP is stop

Label.Text: Step 1: Before starting Quick TAS Learning, following conditions shall be met.
RPM should be in range : Target RPM +- 200 RPM
*Note : Be sure to Turn off : A/C, Head lamp, Radio, Navigation, Rear defogger, other electric load impact items.
( x : "Complete" if TAS learning done sucessfully )
Push Start button, and go to Step 4, status check
Step 3: Learning Status check : Wait. Learning takes around 20 - 60s
( x : ON - Gear Position in N or P)
This value will be updated if TAS learned OK
